---
id: domain.index
type: index
status: draft
domain: domain
summary: Routes one Aobus documentation area and defines its ownership boundaries.
---
# Area title

## Purpose

Explain why this documentation area exists and who should start here.

## Responsibilities

List the product, system, or contributor concerns owned by this area.

## Out of scope

Link the neighboring areas that own excluded concerns.

## System context

Show where this area fits in the larger Aobus model when it represents a subsystem.

## Terminology

Define the small vocabulary readers need before following the document map.

## Document map

Group links by purpose: architecture, specifications, reference, user guides, development guides, and decisions.
Do not repeat summaries already owned by child metadata beyond the context needed to choose a document.

## Recommended reading paths

Give short paths for newcomers, implementers, reviewers, and troubleshooters when their needs differ.

## Implementation and test map

Link the primary source and test areas without duplicating child document maps.
